scripts.check:config: node -e "import('./src/config/dynamic-config.js').then(c => { c.default.validate(); console.log('✅ 配置验证通过'); }).catch(e => { console.error('❌ 配置验证失败:', e.message); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.check:routes: node -e "import('./src/config/routes.js').then(r => { const routes = r.default || r; console.log('✅ 路由系统正常'); console.log('可用路由:', Object.keys(routes.getAllRoutes()).join(', ')); }).catch(e => { console.error('❌ 路由系统错误:', e.message); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.check:all: npm run check:hardcoded && npm run check:config && npm run check:routes
